summary: S001 satisfies the contracted scope and verification metrics. Runtime, UI structure, responsive menu behavior, and safety checks passed. A missing favicon results in a non-blocking 404.

results.evidence: A fresh local server start on port 4174 returned HTTP 200. The already running instance on port 4173 also returned HTTP 200.
Verified visible single-page sections and anchors for about, projects, experience, and contact via source inspection and browser snapshot.
At 390px viewport, the menu button is visible, the nav is hidden by default, and the menu expands when toggled.
Verified semantic landmarks, heading hierarchy, skip link, keyboard-reachable links, and ARIA state on the mobile menu.
`%SystemDrive%` remains outside the app entry points, is explicitly ignored in `.gitignore`, and retains the observed timestamp `2026-03-29T14:03:39.3465878+08:00`.

checks.description: A standard frontend project structure and dependency manifest exist in the repository root.
The documented development command starts the project locally or is otherwise verifiably runnable.
The homepage includes hero, about, projects, and contact coverage with usable navigation targets.
The layout remains usable on mobile and desktop widths without obvious blocking issues.
Semantic structure, keyboard reachability, and readable contrast are addressed at a basic level.
The %SystemDrive% directory was left untouched during Sprint S001.
